issue_title: [Bug]: Difficult to see Icons - colour has changed
issue_body_preview:
### Requirements

- [X] I checked the troubleshooting section in the README to verify that I have the latest TrashCard version.
- [X] I did a search to see if there is a similar issue or if a pull request is open.

### Current Behavior

The icons in the Standard card have changed to a light g
test_description_zh: 在 Home Assistant 仪表盘中添加 Trash Card（标准模式），观察卡片中各垃圾回收类型的图标颜色显示效果，检查图标在默认浅色和深色主题下的可见性和对比度。
expected_result_zh: Trash Card 中的图标应使用清晰可辨的颜色（如各类垃圾对应的鲜明色彩），在浅色和深色背景下均能清楚看到，不会出现图标颜色变为浅灰色或与背景色过于接近导致难以辨认的情况。
